1.acrostic: UNVEILING TRUE LIGHT, JOHN ADMITS, BEHOLD, FOLLOWED, NATHANAEL

2.acrostic: NEED MORE WINE, TEMPLE WHIP, SAW

3.acrostic: I SAY BE BORN AGAIN, HE GAVE, JOHN EXALTS JESUS

4.acrostic: QUESTIONS FROM THE WOMAN AT THE WELL, HARVESTS, MANY, OFFICIAL'S SON

5.acrostic: UNEXPECTED MERCY, SON EQUAL WITH GOD, TESTIFY ABOUT JESUS

6.acrostic: EVERY BASKET FULL, WATER WALK, JESUS IS THE LIVING BREAD SENT FROM HEAVEN, MANY TURN BACK

7.acrostic: GOES IN STEALTH, GOD'S TEACHER, BELIEVE, GOING, OUT, SPLIT, PHARISEES

8.acrostic: OLDEST FIRST, OPEN LIGHT OF THE WORLD, OBEY MY WORD HE WILL NEVER SEE DEATH

9.acrostic: SAW A BLIND MAN, PHARISEES DRIVING HIM OUT, SIN SEEN

10.acrostic: PASTURES FOR MY OWN SHEEP, PROVING THAT I AM GOD'S SON

11.acrostic: END OF LAZARUS LIFE, ETERNAL LIFE, EYES ARE WET, EXIT NOW, EPHRAIM TO HIDE

12.acrostic: LET HER ALONE, LAY PALMS, LIGHT A LITTLE WHILE, LOOK AND BELIEVE

13.acrostic: A SERVANT IS NOT GREATER, ATE MY BREAD, A ROOSTER

14.acrostic: BELIEVE MY WORKS, BUT THE HELPER TRUTH

15.acrostic: OBSERVE MY COMMANDS, ON THEIR LAW

16.acrostic: UNTO YOU THE TRUTH, USING NAME, UP IN PEACE

17.acrostic: TO SON, THE WORD IS TRUTH, THEY ONE

18.acrostic: LET THEM GO ON, LEAD FIRST TO ANNAS, LISTEN TO TRUTH

19.acrostic: ONE CROWN OF THORNS, ONE SOLDIER PIERCED SIDE, OF OIL

20.acrostic: VIEW LINENS, VIEW LORD, VOICE, VERIFIED
